text.title: Kubernetes Rolling Update Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `Kubernetes Rolling Update` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: pdb-design
step.action: Pick PDB minAvailable / maxUnavailable matching SLO.

step.name: strategy-tune
step.action: Pick maxUnavailable / maxSurge per SLO; set minReadySeconds; set progressDeadline.

step.name: drill-rollout
step.action: Apply; observe rolling deploy; verify PDB blocks bad drain; verify progress-deadline alert fires.
